name: Nathaniel Shilkret
description: American composer, conductor, clarinetist, pianist, business executive, and music director (1889-1982)
abstract: Nathaniel Shilkret (December 25, 1889 – February 18, 1982) was an American musician, composer, conductor and musical director.

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Barbarin
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...this was the Zulus with Nat Shilkrit... you remember him... [INTERVIEWEE] They should have played Sing On...

about_quotes.speaker: Bud Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: Fud Livingston got a fantastic offer from a fellow by the name of Nat Shilkret... who was a big figure with Victor Records

about_quotes.speaker: Chauncey Morehouse
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] No, okay. Too much. Were you with Nat Schilkret? >> [INTERVIEWEE] Nat Shilkret, yes.

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: When I worked later with Nat Shilkret and -- Green, Joe Green.
